titleZh: Vibe Coding 实战指南：产品经理如何把想法真正跑通
titleEn: Vibe Coding Practical Guide: How PMs Turn Ideas into Working Results
introZh: 从产品经理视角讲清楚 Vibe Coding 不是“和 AI 聊天”，而是把目标、边界、方案和验收标准结构化地喂给 AI，再用最小闭环把想法跑通。
introEn: A PM-focused guide to Vibe Coding: not chatting with AI, but structuring goals, boundaries, plans, and acceptance criteria so ideas can be turned into working results through the smallest possible closed loop.
